testcase.name: testDivideByZero
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-10T10:36:18.740+05:30 ERROR 24213 --- [calculation-service] [o-auto-1-exec-3] o.a.c.c.C.[.[.[/].[dispatcherServlet] : Servlet.service() for servlet [dispatcherServlet] in context with path [] threw exception [Request processing failed: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Cannot divide by zero] with root cause
